name: Tangerine Shortbread
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Fresh tangerine or orange peel
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in the tangerine juice and peel.
3. Add the flour; mix well.
4. Divide the dough into two portions.
5. Press each portion evenly into a greased and floured 8-inch round cake pan.
6. Decorate the edges by crimping or pressing with the tines of a fork.
7. Prick the dough with a fork to score it into pie-shaped wedges.
8. Bake on the center rack in a preheated 325-degree oven for 20 to 25 minutes, until the shortbread is golden and the edges are light brown.
9. Remove from the oven and cut into wedges along the fork-scored lines.
10. Cool completely in the pan. Makes 32 cookies.
